mapper.sql: ROLE_ID, AUTH_ID, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, RESERVED_FIELD1, RESERVED_FIELD2, RESERVED_FIELD3
mapper.select:
select
distinct
'true' as QUERYID,
from tbl_role_auth
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into tbl_role_auth (ROLE_ID, AUTH_ID, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, RESERVED_FIELD1, RESERVED_FIELD2, RESERVED_FIELD3) values (#{roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into tbl_role_auth
ROLE_ID,
AUTH_ID,
UPDATE_TIME,
UPDATE_BY,
RESERVED_FIELD1,
RESERVED_FIELD2,
RESERVED_FIELD3,
#{roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{authId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update tbl_role_auth
ROLE_ID = #{record.roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
AUTH_ID = #{record.authId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UPDATE_BY = #{record.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{record.reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{record.reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{record.reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update tbl_role_auth set ROLE_ID = #{record.roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AUTH_ID = #{record.authId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, UPDATE_BY = #{record.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{record.reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{record.reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{record.reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update tbl_role_auth
UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UPDATE_BY = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where ROLE_ID = #{roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and AUTH_ID = #{authId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.sql: ROLE_ID, AUTH_ID, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, RESERVED_FIELD1, RESERVED_FIELD2, RESERVED_FIELD3
mapper.select: select ROLE_ID, ROLEAUTH.AUTH_ID, ROLEAUTH.UPDATE_TIME, ROLEAUTH.UPDATE_BY, ROLEAUTH.RESERVED_FIELD1, ROLEAUTH.RESERVED_FIELD2, ROLEAUTH.RESERVED_FIELD3 from TBL_ROLE_AUTH ROLEAUTH LEFT JOIN TBL_AUTH AUTH ON AUTH.AUTH_ID=ROLEAUTH.AUTH_ID where ROLE_ID = #{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND AUTH.IS_AVAILABLE='Y'
mapper.insert: insert into TBL_ROLE_AUTH (ROLE_ID, AUTH_ID, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, RESERVED_FIELD1, RESERVED_FIELD2, RESERVED_FIELD3) values (#{roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into TBL_ROLE_AUTH
ROLE_ID,
AUTH_ID,
UPDATE_TIME,
UPDATE_BY,
RESERVED_FIELD1,
RESERVED_FIELD2,
RESERVED_FIELD3,
#{roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{authId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update TBL_ROLE_AUTH
UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UPDATE_BY = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where ROLE_ID = #{roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and AUTH_ID = #{authId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select roleAuth.ROLE_ID, AUTH_ID, roleAuth.UPDATE_TIME, roleAuth.UPDATE_BY, roleAuth.RESERVED_FIELD1, roleAuth.RESERVED_FIELD2, roleAuth.RESERVED_FIELD3 from TBL_ROLE_AUTH roleAuth left join TBL_ROLE us on roleAuth.ROLE_ID = us.ROLE_ID WHERE us.ROLE_ID is not null AND AUTH_ID in
#{authId}
